---
title: "Muhammad Al Hasib"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/IMG_6763.PNG
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/md-al-hasib/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/hasib-utd
    - icon: globe
      text: Personal Website
      href: https://www.alhasib.net/
---
## Intro
Hello! I am **Hasib**, a PhD student in Public Affairs at The University of Texas at Dallas. My work sits at the intersection of technology and governance, specifically focusing on how AI impacts public service delivery.

This website showcases my coursework, research, and data analysis projects.

## Education
* **PhD in Public and Nonprofit Management** |
The University of Texas at Dallas (In Progress)
* **MS in Social Data Analytics and Research** |
The University of Texas at Dallas (2025)
* **MSS in Public Administration** |
University of Barishal (2019)
* **BSS in Public Administration** |
University of Barishal (2018)

## Research Interests
* Behavioral Public Administration
* AI in Public Service
* Public Trust in Institutions
* Healthcare and Police Administration
